name: Боевой Кузнец
description: A Battle Smith is a combination of protector and medic, an expert at defending others and repairing both materiel and personnel. To aid in their work, Battle Smiths are accompanied by a {@creature Steel Defender|EFA}, a protective companion of their own creation.

details.toolProficiency: You gain proficiency with {@item Smith's Tools|XPHB}. If you already have this proficiency, you gain proficiency with one other type of {@item Artisan's Tools|XPHB} of your choice.
details.weaponCrafting: When you craft a nonmagical or magic weapon, the amount of time required to craft it is halved.

features.name: Battle Smith Spells
features.description: When you reach an Artificer level specified in the Battle Smith Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Battle Ready
features.description: Your combat training and your experiments with magic have paid off in two ways.

details.arcaneEmpowerment: When you attack with a magic weapon, you can use your Intelligence modifier, instead of your Strength or Dexterity modifier, for the attack and damage rolls.
details.weaponKnowledge: You gain proficiency with {@variantrule Martial weapons|XPHB}. You can use a weapon with which you have proficiency as a {@variantrule Spellcasting Focus|XPHB} for your Artificer spells.

features.name: Steel Defender
features.description: Your tinkering has borne you a companion, a {@creature Steel Defender|EFA}. You determine the defender's appearance and whether it has two legs or four; your choices don't affect the defender's game statistics. It vanishes if you die.

details.friendly: The {@creature Steel Defender|EFA} is {@variantrule Friendly|XPHB} to you and your allies and obeys you.
details.defenderInCombat: In combat, the defender acts during your turn. It can move and take its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} on its own, but the only action it takes is the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action unless you take a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB} to command it to take an action. If you have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, the defender acts on its own and isn't limited to the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action.
details.restoringOrReplacing: If the defender has died within the last hour, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to touch it and expend a spell slot. The defender returns to life after 1 minute with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} restored. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can create a new defender if you have {@item Smith's Tools|XPHB} in hand. If you already have a defender from this feature, the first one vanishes.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action on your turn. You can forgo one of your attacks when you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action to command your {@creature Steel Defender|EFA} to take the Force-Empowered Rend action.

features.name: Arcane Jolt
features.description: When either you hit a target with an attack roll using a magic weapon or your {@creature Steel Defender|EFA} hits a target, you can channel magical energy through the strike to create one of the following effects:

details.destructiveEnergy: The target takes an extra {@damage 2d6} Force damage.
details.restorativeEnergy: Choose one creature or object you can see within 30 feet of the target. Healing energy flows into the chosen recipient, restoring {@dice 2d6} {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to it.
details.uses: You can use this energy a number of times equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of once), but you can do so no more than once per turn. You regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
